title: Python Quick Installer Pro
shortDescription:
Install Python packages fast with a sleek pip GUI. Live logs, smart suggestions, and a tiny panel make installs effortless.
⚠️ Python and pip must be installed on your system beforehand.
description:
⚠️ Python and pip must be installed on your system beforehand.
Install Python packages, effortlessly.
A sleek Material-inspired GUI for pip with live output, a Tiny Panel for one-click installs (with progress), smart PyPI suggestions, version picker & command preview, full advanced flags (--upgrade, --user, --pre, --no-cache-dir, …), interpreter selector, tray actions (Show/Hide, clipboard install, Exit), and persistent settings.
features: Three modes: Minimal, Pro, and Tiny Panel (floating)
Tiny Panel 2.0: one-line install with inline progress indicator
Live command preview and PyPI version picker
Smart suggestions when a package name looks wrong
System tray actions: Show/Hide, Tiny Panel, Install from Clipboard, Exit
PyPI version picker + live command preview
Tray actions, bug fixes, and performance tweaks
⚠️ Python and pip must be installed on your system beforehand.
benefits: Keep technical workflows visible and controlled
Move from task to result with fewer manual steps
Built around three modes: Minimal, Pro, and Tiny Panel (floating)
Built around tiny Panel 2.0: one-line install with inline progress indicator
Built around live command preview and PyPI version picker
